methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search found ZML generative AI pages, the KI-Policy/Formular-Generator page, the KI-Toolbox pages, and faculty-level generative-AI guidance PDFs.
Firecrawl search found official Faculty of Informatics generative-AI guidance PDFs and additional KIT-controlled teaching/course pages.
Firecrawl search identified the public German KIT guidelines PDF for generative AI.
Public search cross-checked the official KIT guidelines PDF, a KIT news announcement, and faculty-level guidance pages.

artifacts.summary: Official KIT-controlled discovery located public evidence on kit.edu, scc.kit.edu, zml.kit.edu, and informatik.kit.edu. Claims were limited to the public German KIT guidelines PDF, SCC KI-Toolbox service and terms pages, ZML guidance for the KI-Policy/Formular-Generator and student KI-Toolbox use, and a faculty-specific Informatics PDF. The KIT intranet generative-AI page was login-gated, an English guidelines PDF URL returned 404, and a KIT news article was rejected as announcement-only rather than primary policy evidence.

artifacts.claimText: KIT's public German guidelines frame generative AI as a responsible and transparent-use decision aid for KIT, while stating that existing internal rules remain unaffected and take precedence.

artifacts.claimText: For the KIT Faculty of Informatics, generative AI use in student work is allowed when it does not conflict with course learning goals, and AI use in assessed work must be disclosed with purpose, affected parts, and models used.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Leitlinien zum Einsatz generativer KI am KIT
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Diese Leitlinien schaffen als praxisorientierte Entscheidungshilfe einen Rahmen für den verantwortungsvollen und transparenten Einsatz von generativer KI am KIT. Bestehende interne Regelungen, soweit sie sich auf die Anwendung generativer KI beziehen lassen, bleiben unberührt und gehen diesen Leitlinien vor.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: The guidelines serve as a practical decision aid for responsible, transparent use of generative AI at KIT, while existing internal rules remain unaffected and take precedence.
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

citation.citationTitle: Leitlinien zum Einsatz generativer KI am KIT
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Der Zugang ist für KIT-Mitarbeitende, KIT-Studierende (ab April 2026) und Personen mit Gäste-und-Partner-Konto möglich. Der Zugang zur KI-Toolbox setzt den erfolgreichen Abschluss des Selbstlernkurs "Verstehen und Anwenden von generativer KI" auf KOALA (Mitarbeiter) bzw. der ILIAS-Lernplattform (Studierende) voraus.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: Access is possible for KIT employees, KIT students from April 2026, and guests/partners, after completing the required self-study course.
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Personenbezogene Daten (Art. 4 Nr. 1 DSGVO) dürfen ausschließlich über die lokal am KIT gehosteten Modelle verarbeitet werden. Eine Verarbeitung personenbezogener Daten über die Modelle von Azure OpenAI ist untersagt.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: Personal data may be processed only through locally hosted KIT models; processing personal data through Azure OpenAI models is prohibited.
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Diese Werkzeuge stellen keine offizielle oder verpflichtende Vorgabe des KIT dar. Der Formular-Generator wurde als praktischer Vorschlag entwickelt, um Lehrende bei der Gestaltung transparenter und fairer Richtlinien zur KI-Nutzung zu unterstützen. Die letztgültigen Regelungen für Studienleistungen obliegen der Verantwortung der jeweiligen Fakultät und der einzelnen Lehrperson.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: The tools are not an official or mandatory KIT requirement; final rules for coursework are the responsibility of the relevant faculty and instructor.
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Wichtig: Die Nutzung der KI-Toolbox ist nur für Zwecke innerhalb des Studiums erlaubt! Wie ihr die Funktionen im Detail nutzt, liegt bei euch - im Rahmen der geltenden Prüfungs- und Studienordnungen und nur zu Studienzwecken. Die KI-Toolbox ist eine Option, aber die Nutzung von KI kann in jeder Lehrveranstaltung unterschiedlich geregelt sein. Die Verfügbarkeit der Toolbox ist keine Generalerlaubnis.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: Use is only for study purposes; AI use can be regulated differently in each course, and toolbox availability is not a general permission.
artifacts.evidenceLocator: Sections Wofür die KI-Toolbox verwenden? and Wichtige Rahmenbedingungen

artifacts.sourceTitle: Leitfaden für den Einsatz generativer KI in der Lehre an der KIT-Fakultät für Informatik
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Der Einsatz generativer KI in studentischen Arbeiten ist zulässig, sofern er nicht im Widerspruch zu den Lernzielen der jeweiligen Veranstaltung steht. Der Einsatz generativer KI muss in den Prüfungsleistungen kenntlich gemacht werden mit der Angabe, zu welchem Zweck KI eingesetzt wurde, welche Teile der Arbeit von KI generiert oder beeinflusst wurden und welche Modelle verwendet wurden.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: In the KIT Faculty of Informatics, generative AI use in student work is allowed when it does not conflict with learning goals, and assessed work must disclose purpose, affected parts, and models.
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.title: KIT, Karlsruhe Institute of Technology generative AI policy staging notes
artifacts.summary: Official KIT sources support six staged claim candidates: public generative-AI guidelines at KIT, SCC KI-Toolbox access, KI-Toolbox personal-data/model-choice restrictions, non-binding ZML policy-generator guidance, student toolbox boundaries, and a faculty-specific Informatics disclosure rule. The KIT intranet generative-AI page was login-gated, an English guidelines PDF URL returned 404, and a news announcement was rejected as secondary evidence.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
The intranet generative-AI page could not be reviewed because it required KIT Shibboleth login.
The Faculty of Informatics claim is scoped only to that faculty and must not be generalized to all KIT programs.
The staged claims are agent-reviewed candidates only and are not canonical public claims.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
